Hist : History

    InvImage (fun x1 x2 => x1 < x2)
        (fun x =>
          PSigma.casesOn x fun Hist L =>
            PSigma.casesOn L fun L R =>
              PSigma.casesOn R fun R lr_nlf =>
                PSigma.casesOn lr_nlf fun lr_nlf tab =>
                  PSigma.casesOn tab fun tab s => PSigma.casesOn s fun s s_in => s.length)
        y вҹЁHist, Lвңқвҹ© вҶ’
      вӢҜ в–ё y.2.2.2.2.2.1.flip вҲҲ exitsOf y.1 (y.2.1, y.2.2.1, some y.2.2.2.1) y.2.2.2.2.1

sвңқВ№ : PathIn tabвңқ.flip
s_inвңқВ№ : sвңқВ№ вҲҲ exitsOf (List.map Sequent.flip Hist) (Sequent.flip (L, R, some lr_nlf)) tabвңқ.flip
aвңқ :
  вҲҖ
    (y :
      (Hist : History) Г—'
        (L : List Formula) Г—'
          (R : List Formula) Г—'
            (lr_nlf : NegLoadFormula вҠ• NegLoadFormula) Г—'
              (tab : Tableau Hist (L, R, some lr_nlf)) Г—'

        y вҹЁHist, вҹЁL, вҹЁR, вҹЁlr_nlf, вҹЁtabвңқ, вҹЁsвңқВ№, s_inвңқВ№вҹ©вҹ©вҹ©вҹ©вҹ©вҹ© вҶ’
      вӢҜ в–ё y.2.2.2.2.2.1.flip вҲҲ exitsOf y.1 (y.2.1, y.2.2.1, some y.2.2.2.1) y.2.2.2.2.1
nlf : NegLoadFormula
tab : Tableau Hist (L, R, some (Sum.inl nlf))
sвңқ : PathIn tab.flip
s_inвңқ :
  sвңқ вҲҲ
    if (Sequent.flip (L, R, some (Sum.inl nlf))).isLoaded = true then
      @exitsOf.match_2 (List.map Sequent.flip Hist) (Sequent.flip (L, R, some (Sum.inl nlf)))
        (fun tab => List (PathIn tab)) tab.flip (fun lpr => [])
        (fun nrep nbas lt next =>
          List.flatMap
            (fun x =>
              @exitsOf.match_1 (Sequent.flip (L, R, some (Sum.inl nlf))) lt
                (fun x => List (PathIn (Tableau.loc nrep nbas lt next))) x fun Y Y_in =>
                List.map (PathIn.loc Y_in)
                  (exitsOf (Sequent.flip (L, R, some (Sum.inl nlf)) :: List.map Sequent.flip Hist) Y (next Y Y_in)))
            (endNodesOf lt).attach)
        fun Y nrep bas r next =>
        List.map PathIn.pdl (exitsOf (Sequent.flip (L, R, some (Sum.inl nlf)) :: List.map Sequent.flip Hist) Y next)
    else [PathIn.nil]
Histвңқ : History
Xвңқ Yвңқ : Sequent
nrepвңқВІ : В¬rep Histвңқ Xвңқ
basвңқВ№ : Xвңқ.basic
hвңқВі : Hist = Histвңқ
nrepвңқВ№ : В¬rep Hist Xвңқ
hвңқВІ : (L, R, some (Sum.inl nlf)) = Xвңқ
basвңқ : Sequent.basic (L, R, some (Sum.inl nlf))
rвңқ : PdlRule (L, R, some (Sum.inl nlf)) Yвңқ
nrepвңқ : В¬rep Hist (L, R, some (Sum.inl nlf))
nextвңқВІ : Tableau ((L, R, some (Sum.inl nlf)) :: Hist) Yвңқ
hвңқВ№ : tab вүҚ Tableau.pdl nrepвңқ basвңқ rвңқ nextвңқВІ
s : PathIn (Tableau.pdl nrepвңқ basвңқ rвңқ nextвңқВІ).flip
s_in :
  s вҲҲ
    if (Sequent.flip (L, R, some (Sum.inl nlf))).isLoaded = true then
      @exitsOf.match_2 (List.map Sequent.flip Hist) (Sequent.flip (L, R, some (Sum.inl nlf)))
        (fun tab => List (PathIn tab)) (Tableau.pdl nrepвңқ basвңқ rвңқ nextвңқВІ).flip (fun lpr => [])
        (fun nrep nbas lt next =>
          List.flatMap
            (fun x =>
              @exitsOf.match_1 (Sequent.flip (L, R, some (Sum.inl nlf))) lt
                (fun x => List (PathIn (Tableau.loc nrep nbas lt next))) x fun Y Y_in =>
                List.map (PathIn.loc Y_in)
                  (exitsOf (Sequent.flip (L, R, some (Sum.inl nlf)) :: List.map Sequent.flip Hist) Y (next Y Y_in)))
            (endNodesOf lt).attach)
        fun Y nrep bas r next =>
        List.map PathIn.pdl (exitsOf (Sequent.flip (L, R, some (Sum.inl nlf)) :: List.map Sequent.flip Hist) Y next)
    else [PathIn.nil]
eвңқВІ : PathIn nextвңқВІ.flip
hвңқ :
  eвңқВІ вҲҲ
      exitsOf ((R, L, some (Sum.inr nlf)) :: List.map Sequent.flip Hist)
        (match Yвңқ with
        | (L, R, O) => (R, L, Option.map Sum.swap O))
        nextвңқВІ.flip вҲ§
    eвңқВІ.pdl = s
e_inвңқВІ :
  eвңқВІ вҲҲ
    exitsOf ((R, L, some (Sum.inr nlf)) :: List.map Sequent.flip Hist)
      (match Yвңқ with
      | (L, R, O) => (R, L, Option.map Sum.swap O))
      nextвңқВІ.flip
def_s : eвңқВІ.pdl = s
LY : List Formula
sndвңқВ№ : List Formula Г— Olf
nextвңқВ№ : Tableau ((L, R, some (Sum.inl nlf)) :: Hist) (LY, sndвңқВ№)
eвңқВ№ : PathIn nextвңқВ№.flip
e_inвңқВ№ :
  eвңқВ№ вҲҲ
    exitsOf ((R, L, some (Sum.inr nlf)) :: List.map Sequent.flip Hist)
      (match (LY, sndвңқВ№) with
      | (L, R, O) => (R, L, Option.map Sum.swap O))
      nextвңқВ№.flip
RY : List Formula
sndвңқ : Olf
nextвңқ : Tableau ((L, R, some (Sum.inl nlf)) :: Hist) (LY, RY, sndвңқ)
eвңқ : PathIn nextвңқ.flip
e_inвңқ :
  eвңқ вҲҲ
    exitsOf ((R, L, some (Sum.inr nlf)) :: List.map Sequent.flip Hist)
      (match (LY, RY, sndвңқ) with
      | (L, R, O) => (R, L, Option.map Sum.swap O))
      nextвңқ.flip
lr_nlf_Y : NegLoadFormula вҠ• NegLoadFormula
next : Tableau ((L, R, some (Sum.inl nlf)) :: Hist) (LY, RY, some lr_nlf_Y)
e : PathIn next.flip
e_in :
  e вҲҲ
    exitsOf ((R, L, some (Sum.inr nlf)) :: List.map Sequent.flip Hist)
      (match (LY, RY, some lr_nlf_Y) with
      | (L, R, O) => (R, L, Option.map Sum.swap O))
      next.flip
вҠў e.length < sвңқВ№.length
